_comment: E8-4 model/budget policy. Model IDs here are [UNVERIFIED] placeholders. DO NOT commit a real modelId without (1) a verifiedAt ISO date, (2) a source URL pointing at official provider docs confirming the ID, and (3) an eval baseline at evals/model-routing/baseline-<class>.json (for roles: baseline-<role-slug>.json, e.g. baseline-discovery-worker.json). See docs/model-policy.md.

tiny.modelId: [UNVERIFIED — set after confirming with official docs]

standard.modelId: [UNVERIFIED — set after confirming with official docs]

large.modelId: [UNVERIFIED — set after confirming with official docs]

discoveryWorker.modelId: [UNVERIFIED — set after confirming with official docs]
